variants.title: HiFi Filter SAVI 0301FP004 Nut
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAVI 0301FP004 Nut. Easy to install and replace, the SAVI 0301FP004 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: NUT, Dimension 1 (D1): 53.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 28.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 15.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M8X1,25, Height 1 (H1): 31.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 23.5 mm, Height 3 (H3): 13.5 mm
